body: Marcus, great catching up with you briefly at the [SustainableTech Summit](events/sustainable-tech-summit) last week — I've been meaning to follow up since our conversation got cut short. I wanted to circle back on the [Halfway Capital](orgs/halfway-capital) co-investment thesis we touched on, specifically around the overlap between your climate infrastructure portfolio and some of the seed deals we're tracking heading into Q1. There are two or three founders in the carbon capture data layer space that I think would genuinely benefit from having both of us at the table, and I'd love to get your read on where a16z is leaning on ticket size for that segment right now. Would a 30-minute call sometime the week of December 8th work on your end? Happy to send a Calendly link if easier.
